message:
feat(node): runtime dispatch overhaul, fuzz corpus expansion, and connector hardening

Runtime dispatch and configuration:
  - engine_dispatcher: add PreferredRuntime support so the config can
    request a specific runtime (e.g. node, deno, bun) with explicit
    vs fallback execution modes and a new DispatchResolutionError for
    unavailable runtimes. Refactor command_exists_with into
    resolve_command_path_with for reuse across dispatch plans.
  - config: add PreferredRuntime enum and profile_examples.toml entries
  - cli: surface new runtime preference in CLI argument parsing
  - main: expanded main entry point with runtime selection, config
    validation, and improved startup sequencing

Fuzz corpus expansion (fuzz_corpus.rs — ~1100 new lines):
  - Major expansion of the deterministic fuzz corpus with new fixture
    adapters, truthful execution gates, crash/hang/coverage classifiers,
    and infrastructure failure handling
  - Updated fuzz targets (migration_package_parse, shim_api_translation,
    shim_type_coercion) to use the new corpus API
  - Expanded check_fuzz_corpus.py validator and its test suite
  - Updated integration/fuzz_corpus_gates.rs with new gate assertions

Connector and registry hardening:
  - lease_service, obligation_tracker, saga: additional validation
    and edge-case handling
  - staking_governance: expanded governance surface
  - supply_chain/provenance: extended provenance tracking (staged)
  - lane_router: minor fix

Test suites:
  - incident_cli_e2e: expanded E2E test coverage (staged, +275 lines)
  - trust_cli_e2e: new trust-related CLI E2E tests (+94 lines)
  - check_placeholder_surface_inventory.py: expanded validator

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
